imports.post_text: The most underrated ML paper of 2024 is probably 'The Platonic Representation Hypothesis' — the idea that as models get bigger and train on more data, they all converge to the same internal representation of reality. Worth reading before building embeddings.
imports.your_notes: File for Month 2 reading. Karpathy's framing of why embeddings work is exactly what I need before implementing cosine similarity.
imports.action_taken: Added to LATER.md under Month 2 Embeddings

imports.post_text: Ollama just shipped structured output support — you can now force a local LLM to return valid JSON matching a Pydantic schema. This makes local agents significantly more reliable.
imports.your_notes: Directly relevant to Week 6. Try this during Ollama install exercise.
